Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 30}When Metis's Theurgy gauge is maxed, her Theurgy, {f 0 1 2}Orgia Mode{f 0 1 27}, can be used.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Once {f 0 1 2}Orgia Mode{f 0 1 27} is activated, Metis will automatically attack during her turn for three rounds unprompted. During Orgia Mode, her Attack and Defense will increase significantly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 31}Keep in mind that, once Orgia Mode ends, Metis will {f 0 1 2}Overheat{f 0 1 27}, rendering her immobile for her next turn.[n]{f 1 1}
